description: C1-nC4 VLE based on Wang & McKetta (1964) conditions
source: Wang, R.H. & McKetta, J.J. (1964). J. Chem. Eng. Data, 9(1), 30-35

mi_settings.notes: Expected values are PR-EOS computed (not raw experimental). Conditions from 100F, 1000 psia data point.

expected.notes: PR-EOS with zero BIPs. Literature experimental: nV~0.35, K_C1~4.1, K_nC4~0.10.
